title: Agent Audit Rule
description: Single rule for AI-generated code quality: anti-pattern to detect, severity, dimension, and fix suggestion. Consumed by Dragonfly and other audit engines.

description.description: Human-readable description of what the rule checks for

anti_pattern.description: How to detect the bad code

type.description: Match strategy: regex (code text), ast (parsed tree), semantic (language-specific), grep (line-level)

pattern.description: Regex or pattern string; interpretation depends on type

path_glob.description: Optional glob to restrict which files the rule applies to, e.g. **/*.ts

fix_suggestion.description: How the agent or developer should fix the issue

severity.description: error = fail gate; warning = report; info = advisory

dimension.description: Quality dimension: security (AEO/VEO), a11y, SEO, architecture (e.g. API-first), best-practices, syntax

tags.description: Optional tags for filtering, e.g. vibecoding, xss, credentials
